items.text: @DeItaone: $SPCX - SPACEX IPO DRAWS $5B BLACKROCK ORDER

@Elon Musk’s SpaceX is preparing a $75B share sale, with huge investor demand. BlackRock ordered at least $5B, and other asset managers and sovereign funds placed similarly large bids. Total demand reportedly exceeds $70B from individuals alone. IPO is set for Friday at $135 per share despite governance concerns and geopolitical market volatility.: INSTITUTIONAL
